A Pinky Promise

crafted with care, steeped with love,
and delivered with a warmth
you can taste in every sip.

This is our delicately kept promise
to you.

Our Story

More Than Tea —
It's a Promise

Milk & Honey Premium Tea was born from a simple belief: everyone deserves a moment that feels like home. Nestled right here in Glendora, we set out to create a place where great tea meets genuine warmth.

We hand-select premium teas — from delicate Magnolia Jasmine to bold Red Oolong — and pair them with house-made toppings, fresh foam, and real ingredients. Whether you're grabbing a classic Earl Grey or building your dream boba, every cup is made with intention.

We're your neighbors. Your corner spot. The place you'll want to come back to — because we promise we'll make it worth it.

Premium Teas House-Made Toppings Glendora Local Open 7 Days

🍵 Pro Tip

Start with a Red Oolong Milk Tea, add Honey Boba and a dollop of Cream Cheese Mousse. Sweeten it with Brown Sugar. You can thank us later. 🤙

🍵

April 2026

Lavender Honey
Oolong Latte

This month we're celebrating spring with our most requested seasonal creation. Our premium Red Oolong — naturally smooth and lightly floral — gets kissed with house lavender syrup, a drizzle of wildflower honey, and crowned with our signature Honey Cold Foam. It's calm in a cup. Floral, warm, and just a little magical.

Red Oolong Base Lavender Syrup Honey Cold Foam Seasonal
$7.25 Available all of April
while supplies last

What People Are Saying

Loved by Glendora

Don't take our word for it — here's what our neighbors are saying.

⭐ Rated 5 Stars on Yelp
Read Our Reviews →
★★★★★

This place is legit. As someone who's tried boba all over the SGV, Milk & Honey is something different. The Red Oolong is smooth and not overpowering — and the honey cold foam on top is *chef's kiss.* I will definitely be back.

K
Kevin M.
Yelp Review
★★★★★

Absolutely love this spot. The Magnolia Jasmine tea is so delicate and floral — you can tell they use real premium ingredients. The vibe is cozy and the staff are genuinely sweet. Our new go-to in Glendora!

S
Sara L.
Yelp Review
★★★★★

The Brown Sugar Milk Tea Boba is addicting. I've been twice this week. The boba is perfectly chewy, the tea flavor is strong and real — not watered down like other places. Glendora needed this.

J
Jasmine T.
